name: Task page source format standard
definitionOfDone: AMCore User UI generator renders task source summaries as conversation or meeting sources
Project-local User UI generator is aligned with AMCore where present
Task pages do not render the standalone source-evidence section
Task pages do not render raw judgment-supplement fallback cards
LINE source evidence renders with archive-style metadata header and next-line message body
SevenAM task pages are regenerated with the accepted format
HOZO AM task pages are regenerated with the accepted format
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
